name: Ricki Table Lamp - 24 Inch Height - TBL4589 - Black - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the sleek and sophisticated Ricki Table Lamp. Crafted with a durable metal body in a timeless black finish, this lamp is designed to complement any decor. The unique rattan shade adds a touch of natural elegance while softly diffusing the light, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere in your room.

Measuring 24.6 inches tall with the shade reaching a diameter of 10.15 inches at its widest, this lamp is an ideal size for any table or desk. The sturdy base, having a 6.25-inch diameter, ensures stability on any surface. With a 60-inch cord, you have the flexibility to place it just where you need it, making the Ricki Table Lamp a versatile addition to your home or office.

Whether you're reading, working or just enjoying a relaxed evening, the Ricki Table Lamp is a functional yet stylish choice that will brighten up your day.
